This is how we’ve turned creators into serious earners with us.

What do you think — ready to run it?

I hope this email finds you well. My name is Vincenzo Passariello, CMO of Black Forest Supplements, a brand that is passionate about bringing back traditional masculinity.

I especially like how your custom gunsmithing content highlights the precision and artistry required for professional-grade builds.

Just as we've found a great fit with influencers like JP Reacts, Heavy Duty Country, and Steve Turley, we think your distinctive voice could be a perfect match for our brand.

Hey! Really glad to hear that — the long-term focus is exactly how we think too.

Here's how we work:

We structure our collaborations around commission guarantees rather than flat fees. You earn 20% commission on every sale you drive, and we set a guaranteed minimum upfront — if your commissions don't reach that number, we cover the difference. If they exceed it, you keep everything above it too.

Our goal isn't just getting videos posted. It's building a system where you're generating consistent GMV month after month, and we're scaling it together. Creators who perform well with us move into bigger deals and long-term retainers as the partnership grows.

We also provide scripts, angles, and creative direction so you're never starting from

What do you think — ready to run it?

hope you’re having a great Day!

We start you at a commission that’s higher than our open plan, plug you into our private Discord where we share daily winning scripts, converting angles, promo timing, and real-time feedback, and we work with you hands-on to make sure you’re not just posting, you’re driving consistent sales.

The goal isn’t a quick test. It’s to help you build predictable GMV. Once you’re comfortable with the product and we see momentum, we transition into a long-term retainer and scale you properly.
This is how we’ve turned creators into serious earners with us.

What do you think — ready to run it?
